rules.label: probe_exploit_attempt
rules.description: High volatility with short horizon suggests probing or exploit attempts.

rules.label: sustained_entropy_collection
rules.description: Sustained entropy anomaly without structural damage suggests collection behavior.

rules.label: system_degradation_pressure
rules.description: Correlation surge with fallback pressure suggests degradation attempts.

rules.label: configuration_manipulation
rules.description: Transition shifts with drift escalation suggest configuration pressure.
